title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work at our company?
A: Employees may be eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements based on their role, performance, and departmental needs. To apply, employees should submit a formal request to their direct supervisor, outlining the proposed work arrangement and justifications. Requests will be reviewed on a quarterly basis, with decisions communicated within two weeks of submission. Expectations for remote and hybrid work include maintaining regular communication with team members, attending all required meetings, and meeting performance goals as outlined in your job description. Employees must also ensure they have a suitable work environment that supports productivity. For any questions or further clarification, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
